introSection: Mad Mouse was a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Quassy Amusement Park in Middlebury, Connecticut, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride was purchased from Allan Herschell in April 1967 by the late Joseph Tolve, owner of Playland Park. It is not known how long it operated there, but it was relocated to Quassy Amusement Park for the 1981 season.

After the 2010 season, the Mad Mouse was taken down, and replaced with Wooden Warrior in 2011.

fullText:
Mad Mouse was a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Quassy Amusement Park in Middlebury, Connecticut, USA.

The ride was purchased from Allan Herschell in April 1967 by the late Joseph Tolve, owner of Playland Park. It is not known how long it operated there, but it was relocated to Quassy Amusement Park for the 1981 season.

After the 2010 season, the Mad Mouse was taken down, and replaced with Wooden Warrior in 2011.
